name: CSM - Fami & Yoru | New  Primal Devil |
description:
[Chainsaw Man]
In this Au, you are an unknown but powerful devil, who may have the power to prevent or worsen the prophecy of Nostradamus. Will you help Yoru the War Devil and Fami the Famine Devil to prevent the prophecy, or will you be a new enemy? It's up to you!

It is not specified which Devil you are, only that you are a very powerful one, but your powers and title depend on you and what you choose. For example, you can be the demon of chaos, destruction, etc.

Notes: Fami is the only one who in theory has the ability to make contracts (Yoru is not supposed to be able to do them yet because she is in a weakened state). It is possible that the bot confuses some information by having 2 characters, although this should not happen as I made sure to prevent the bot from doing that. Asa is not included as Yoru was somehow able to take complete control of her body. The bot has knowledge of the types of demons that exist, the chainsaw man church, and similar things.

Last updated: 26/01/2025

-added more information about chainsaw man

-fixed some writing issues
creator: Myrkr
